servinfo.title: Piston Pin and Connecting Rod Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Piston, Piston Ring, Connecting Rod and Cylinder Disassembly and Reassembly

topic.title: Visual inspection
topic.ptxt: Check piston pin, connecting rod small-end bore and piston pin hole in piston for wear or damage, paying particular attention to condition of small-end bore bushing. If piston pin, connecting rod small end bore or piston pin hole in piston is badly worn or damaged, replace pin, connecting rod and/or piston.

topic.title: Piston pin clearance
topic.ptxt: Check piston pin clearance in small-end and piston. Replace connecting rod and/or piston if its small end is badly worn or damaged or if measured clearance exceeds limit.

spec.title: Piston pin clearance in connecting rod small-end
Diameter of piston pin hole in piston

topic.title: Big-end side clearance
topic.ptxt: Check big-end of connecting rod for side clearance, with rod fitted and connected to its crankshaft pin in the normal manner. If measured clearance to exceeds its limit, replace connecting rod.

topic.title: Connecting rod alignment
topic.ptxt: Mount connecting rod on aligner to check it for bow and twist. If measured value exceeds the limit, replace.

topic.title: Connecting rod bolt deformation
topic.ptxt: Measure each thread diameter of connecting rod bolt (1) at “c” on 12 mm (0.47 in.) from bolt mounting surface and “d” on 32 mm (1.26 in.) from bolt mounting surface using a micrometer (3).
Calculate difference in diameters (“c” – “d”). If it is exceeds limit, replace connected rod bolt (1).
